query: SELECT e.id, e.title, e.videoUrl, e.seasonId, s.title as seasonTitle, ser.title as seriesTitle FROM episodes e JOIN seasons s ON e.seasonId = s.id JOIN series ser ON s.seriesId = ser.id ORDER BY ser.id, s.id, e.episodeNumber
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4W5PAba9uynui42.b7caf63a08e3 --database NpXwGYEEh9MzoQzGANzYad --execute SELECT e.id, e.title, e.videoUrl, e.seasonId, s.title as seasonTitle, ser.title as seriesTitle FROM episodes e JOIN seasons s ON e.seasonId = s.id JOIN series ser ON s.seriesId = ser.id ORDER BY ser.id, s.id, e.episodeNumber
